productDisplayName: Fila Men Aruba Navy Grey Sandal
description: Designed for utmost comfort, this pair of sandals from fila have all that the feet require. With cushioned, adjustable straps and multi-directional lugs on the outsole, this pair offers ample comfort and stability. It also has an impact guidance system on the outsole that ensures ample stability in gait.This range of Aruba sandals from fila come in shades of black, grey and navy blue. Pair them with casual wear like jeans, cargo pants or shorts and spend the summer in the glory of comfort in style.Upper Heavy cotton canvas upper for support and durability Cushioned, adjustable velcro strap at forefoot and front of the ankle lined with synthetic tape on the outside Cushioned back strap Midsole Breathable EVA footbed for cushioning and shock resistance Ergonomically designed footbed with grooves and depressions for ample foot comfort Outsole Made of lightweight Thermo Plastic Rubber (TPR) for extra durability, weather resistance and excellent abrasion resistance Multi-directional lugs for stability and grip Impact guidance system all along the outsole for added stability and comfort Fila branding on heel Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
